NQ.timestamp_adapter: parse ET vendor labels; remove incomplete final source date; shift labels back one minute to canonical bar-open ET

USA500_PROXY.source: Dukascopy USA500.IDX/USD active one-minute bid candles
USA500_PROXY.timestamp_adapter: milliseconds UTC bar-open labels converted to America/New_York and made timezone-naive only after conversion
USA500_PROXY.classification: bid-CFD S&P 500 proxy with synthetic ES-equivalent execution economics
limitations: Dukascopy feed volume rather than CME volume

arms.E6: exclude near prior-day directional extreme at the frozen 0.25 prior-day ATR threshold
arms.E6_NO_FOMC_DAY: E6 plus reject entries whose ET calendar date is an official FOMC statement date

strategy_lock.all_signal_entry_stop_target_exit_parame: identical to frozen NQ E6 engine

usa500_e6_replication_rule.DIRECTIONAL_REPLICATION_SUPPORTED: normal net R > 0, normal expectancy > 0, profit factor > 1, positive net R in at least two years, and two-tick expectancy > 0
usa500_e6_replication_rule.PARTIAL_COST_FRAGILE_REPLICATION: normal net R > 0 and expectancy > 0 but at least one support gate fails

inference.method: independent ET-market-date block bootstrap by instrument and arm
inference.purpose: descriptive uncertainty and directional transfer classification only

restrictions: no dollar return comparison across instruments
no live sizing, Pine or deployment authorization
